name: reflex
description: Operational repair memory for OpenAI Codex CLI tool calls.

interface.shortDescription: Codex learns from failed tool calls.
interface.longDescription: Reflex records failed tool-call episodes, lets Codex register reusable repairs, and injects concise scoped hints before similar future tool calls.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Reflex to remember reusable operational repairs after failed supported Codex tool calls are successfully fixed.
